name: pi-gui-extension
description: Localhost web UI for pi — multi-session chat over the same coding-agent SDK as the terminal.
author: Ankit Chouhan (https://github.com/ankitchouhan1020)

scripts.dev: npm run dev:web & npm run dev:server
scripts.smoke: node --input-type=module -e "await import('./server/hub.js'); await import('./server/http.js'); await import('./server/sse-protocol.js'); console.log('smoke ok')"
scripts.test: npm run smoke && node --test server/stabilize.test.js server/sse-protocol.test.js && node --experimental-strip-types --test web/src/lib/chat-stream.test.ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm test && npm install --prefix web && npm run build
